ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the application (e.g., scientific, machine learning) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flavors" (
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flavor */,
  "flavor_name" TEXT /* Name of the flavor for execution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flavor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the flavor (e.g., parallel, sequential) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flavor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flavor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flavor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application executed */,
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the execution flavor used */,
  "num_threads" INTEGER /* Number of threads used in the execution */,
  "tasks" INTEGER /* Number of tasks processed */,
  "size_red_var" INTEGER /* Size of the reduction variable */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Total execution time in seconds */,
  "time_seq" REAL /* Sequential execution time in seconds */,
  "speedup" REAL /* Speedup achieved by parallel execution */,
  "avg_task_time" REAL /* Average time spent per task */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage in MB */,
  "cpu_utilization" REAL /* CPU utilization in % */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_flavor_id FOREIGN KEY ("flavor_id") REFERENCES flavors ("flavor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being tested */,
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flavor used for execution */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test was conducted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test run (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test run was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_flavor_id FOREIGN KEY ("flavor_id") REFERENCES flavors ("flavor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run associated with this configuration */,
  "num_threads" INTEGER /* Number of threads used */,
  "task_size" INTEGER /* Size of the tasks being processed */,
  "reduction_var" INTEGER /* Size of the reduction variable */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was run (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run from which this result is generated */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric associated with this result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application associated with this data */,
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flavor used */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when this data was recorded */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Total execution time recorded */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Aggregated metrics for the run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_flavor_id FOREIGN KEY ("flavor_id") REFERENCES flavors ("flavor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notify_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run associated with this notification */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result associated with this notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when this notification was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notify_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application associated with this revision */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when this revision was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "cpu" TEXT /* CPU specifications */,
  "memory" TEXT /* Memory specifications */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the machine is located (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the machine was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the machine was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine usage entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run associated with this machine usage */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine used */,
  "usage_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of machine usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the machine usage was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the machine usage was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_usage_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_usage_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)
